title: Bank of Canada Media Advisory - Summary of Deliberations Publication
summary: The Bank of Canada will publish a summary of deliberations from its March 18, 2026 interest rate decision on April 1, 2026. This is a media advisory announcing an upcoming publication rather than the publication itself. The actual content of the summary of deliberations will not be available until the stated release date.
key_points: Bank of Canada will publish summary of deliberations on April 1, 2026
The summary covers deliberations ahead of the March 18, 2026 interest rate decision
This is a media advisory (announcement page), not the actual research content
Content type classified as Press and Media advisories
why_it_matters: Summary of deliberations documents provide insight into the Bank of Canada's internal discussions and decision-making rationale. Markets use this information to understand the committee's thinking on inflation, growth, and monetary policy direction. However, this source is only an announcement of the upcoming release, not the actual deliberation summary.
macro_context: Canadian monetary policy decisions impact CAD currency and Canadian bond markets. The Bank of Canada's rate decisions influence global monetary policy expectations and risk sentiment toward commodity-linked currencies.
